def: Having lived only a short time; not old.
At all times; on every occasion, without exception.
Many times; frequently, on repeated occasions.
Which person; used to ask about someone's identity.
At what time; used to ask about a point in time.
In what way or manner; used to ask how something is done.
An informal way to say goodbye.
An expression used to thank someone.
The number 5, one more than four.
The number 6, one more than five.
The number 7, one more than six.
The number 9, one more than eight.
The day of the week between Sunday and Tuesday.
The day of the week between Monday and Wednesday.
The day of the week between Tuesday and Thursday.
The day of the week between Wednesday and Friday.
The day of the week between Thursday and Saturday.
The day of the week between Friday and Sunday.
The second month of the year, after January.
The third month of the year, after February.
The fourth month of the year, after March.
The sixth month of the year, after May.
The seventh month of the year, after June.
The ninth month of the year, after August.
The tenth month of the year, after September.
The eleventh month of the year, after October.
The twelfth and last month of the year.
The warmest season of the year, between spring and autumn.
The season between summer and winter, when leaves fall.
The coldest season of the year, between autumn and spring.
Having the color of a lemon or the sun.
Having the color of snow or milk.
A person's female child; a girl in relation to her parents.
A person's male child; a boy in relation to his parents.
The mother of one's father or mother.
The father of one's father or mother.
The sister of one's parent, or an uncle's wife.
The brother of one's parent, or an aunt's husband.
One of the hard white structures in the mouth used for chewing.
The rear part of the human body, from neck to hips.
A soft yellow food made from cream, spread on bread.
A sweet substance used to sweeten food and drinks.
An alcoholic drink made from fermented grapes.
The feeling of needing or wanting to eat.
The feeling of needing or wanting to drink.
A utensil with prongs used for eating food.
A utensil with a small bowl used for eating or serving food.
